name: person_sumtotal
description: This table contains comprehensive information about individuals, including personal identifiers, names, demographics, and employment details, serving as a source for various applications within the Sumtotal Learn system.

columns.name: personpk
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the person_sumtotal table.

columns.name: personguid
columns.description: A unique identifier for individuals in the person_sumtotal table.

columns.name: lastname
columns.description: Column representing the last name of a person.

columns.name: firstname
columns.description: The first name of the person, represented as a text string.

columns.name: middlename
columns.description: The middle name of a person, stored as a variable character string.

columns.name: fullname
columns.description: The full name of the person, combining first, middle, and last names.

columns.name: active
columns.description: Indicates whether a person is currently active in the system.

columns.name: gendercode
columns.description: Column representing the gender of a person, stored as a text value.

columns.name: birthdate
columns.description: The date of birth of the person, stored as a string in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: companycd
columns.description: A code representing the company associated with a person.

columns.name: companyname
columns.description: The name of the company associated with the person.

columns.name: startdate
columns.description: The date when a person record becomes effective, represented as a string in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: enddate
columns.description: The date when a person's record is considered inactive or no longer valid.

columns.name: deleted
columns.description: Indicates whether a person record has been deleted.

columns.name: createddate
columns.description: Date when the record was created in the system.

metadata.data_lineage: Data is sourced from various personal information inputs and is populated through automated processes that integrate with the Sumtotal Learn platform.
metadata.data_retention: Data is retained for a period of 7 years to comply with business and regulatory requirements.
access_patterns: Frequent read access for user management and reporting by administrators
Occasional write access for updates by HR and user management systems
metadata.business_purpose: The person_sumtotal table exists to centralize and manage personal information, enabling better user management, reporting, and personalization within the Sumtotal Learn system.
key_relationships: Person to organization relationships for organizational reporting
Person to activity relationships for learning progress tracking
